narrative:
Mentor-On-The-Lake City 4A (precinct in Lake County) has 1,287 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.5 percentage points.
